title: Ninja's BLADE
description: Replaces Your Diamond Sword To Ninja's Ones !!
body:
# THIS PACK IS A FUN BASED PACK .

* WHICH REPLACES YOUR DIAMOND SWORD WITH A NINJA'S BLADE OR SWORD.

# FEATURES :-
 1. REPLACES DIAMOND SWORD TO NINJA'S BLADE .
 2. SMALL IN SIZE , THAT HELP IN PVP AND DON'T COVERS THE SCREEN .
 3. HD TEXTURE .

# SUBSCRIBE ON YOUTUBE TO SUPPORT AND IDEAS !!

 CHANNEL LINK :- [Youtube Channel ](https://youtube.com/@justchillplays?si=x3-0kD95qohjGHiM)
![THIS IS THAT SWORD !!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7da3dafc15ec628287ad87edce9881ccee162e44_0.webp)
